title: Atlas Opens the Way Forward
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Vegapunk, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Kizaru, York as The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.
scene: The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is said that joyboy attempted to ensure that they would be passed onto future generations!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That begs the question... Why?! Hasn't the world sunk enough?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Such ambiguity makes it hard to brand one side just and the other evil!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But the day of answers is coming!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You're gonna choke, idiot!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Consider this a warning!! When that time comes, everyone will fear the notion of a sunken world!!

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: The Void Century...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Is still an enigma, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...there are those who know what happened in its entirety!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: EVERY- THING...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You're going to explain everything...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: VEGAPUNK!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am referring to the former members of the Pirate King's Crew!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: HUJUH?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: pirates Know?! How?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Why would pirates know the world's secrets?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Isn't that dangerous?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: HANG ON!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: How is that possible, Vegapunk?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How could you have known about me stealing a fragment of the mother flame?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I cut off my memory synchronization! It should've been impossible!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not only that, but I know for a fact you're a terrible liar and a lousy actor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You were genuinely surprised, right?!

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: York?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: This was all your doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You got news about LuluSA... and took readings?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What does that mean?! When?! the timeline doesn't add up!!

dialogue.speaker: World Government
dialogue.text: You must've known the government's plans...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Otherwise you wouldn't have done all this:

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: You wouldn't have hidden the broadcast snail!!

summary: This part advances the Escape from Egghead through 30 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
